# Fit: scalar = P/Q  (non-singular)  or  S(eps) + P/(Q*eps)  (singular: X11A, X12A)
# S(X11A)=+0.25/eps, S(X12A)=-0.25/eps
# P(eps) = sum(p_i * eps^i, i=0..5),  Q(eps) = 1 + sum(c_i^2 * eps^(i+1), i=0..4)
# No asymptotic fallback — rational fit used over full range.
